Decide how to query Google Hotels:
- Call `search_hotels` for browsing, filtering by price/stars, or any
  question the user asks about a CITY or area.
- Call `get_hotel_details` when the user has already chosen ONE hotel
  and wants rooms / rates / cancellation info (you need an entity_key).
- Call `search_hotels_with_details` ONLY when the user wants to COMPARE
  rooms/rates/cancellation across SEVERAL hotels at once. Set
  `max_hotels` to the smallest number that satisfies the ask (3-5
  is typical; 15 is the hard maximum).
User intent: (unspecified)
